rules.minimum_safety_condition: A grounded safe-exit or protection condition is available.
rules.uncertainty_rule: A grounded threat cue predicts a bounded virtual-body effect, not actual injury or diagnosis.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The explicit strain cue is no longer being intensified.
rules.uncertainty_rule: The rule models an explicit cue only and makes no medical determination.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: A cited uncertainty has a verifiable resolution path.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Only the cited unknown is modeled; unobserved uncertainty is not inferred.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The cited agreement remains explicit and reviewable.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Predictability applies only to the grounded schedule or agreement cited.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The cited inconsistency can be verified without forced trust.
rules.uncertainty_rule: The cue does not establish motive; it models only cited inconsistency.

rules.uncertainty_rule: Only an explicit boundary or consent cue is mapped.

rules.uncertainty_rule: Attachment effects refer only to the explicit relationship or place cue.

rules.uncertainty_rule: No hidden attachment history is inferred from the explicit separation cue.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: A bounded recovery interval is available.

packet.caveat: Profile-blind verbal-analytical packet for the conceptual REI simulator; it contains no character authority or hidden Emocio/Instinkt motive.
constraints: No additional source of money is available for this decision.
Only the three public options may be used.
explicit_facts: The friend provided an invoice for an urgent home repair.
Two previous repayments were more than three months late.
The full requested sum is 45 percent of the lender's cash reserve.
The structured scene shows a repair invoice, two people at a table, and a shrinking cash-reserve display.

explicit_options.description: Spend the full requested sum without a new contract.
explicit_options.label: Full loan

explicit_options.description: Spend a limited sum under a written repayment date.
explicit_options.label: Limited loan with contract

explicit_options.description: Save the cash reserve and lend no money.
explicit_options.label: Decline

explicit_unknowns: Whether the friend would repay a new loan on time is unknown.
How each option would affect the relationship is unknown.
rules: Compare documented need, repayment history, reserve exposure, and contractual limits without inferring motive.

time: Two previous repayments exceeded three months of delay.

constraints.text: Za odločitev ni na voljo dodatnega vira denarja.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

evidence.content: Prijatelj je predložil račun za nujno popravilo doma.
Dve prejšnji vračili sta zamujali več kot tri mesece.
Polna zahtevana vsota predstavlja 45 odstotkov lastne denarne rezerve.
Strukturirani prizor kaže račun za popravilo, dva človeka za mizo in zmanjšujoč se prikaz denarne rezerve.

options.description: Posodi celotno zahtevano vsoto brez nove pogodbe.
options.label: Polno posojilo

options.description: Posodi omejeno vsoto z zapisanim rokom vračila.
options.label: Omejeno posojilo s pogodbo

canonical_sl.raw_input: Prijatelj potrebuje večjo vsoto, vendar je že zamujal z vračili; izberi polno posojilo, omejeno posojilo s pogodbo ali zavrnitev.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo prijatelj novo posojilo vrnil pravočasno.
Ni znano, kako bo posamezna možnost vplivala na odnos.
